'''Colossus''' was the fifth and outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Belgaroth system/Legends|Belgaroth system]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was the only [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the star system, and it was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by twenty-four [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CatCW" />
